name: bug-fix-null-check
turns: There is a failing test in src/user.test.ts. Read the test and the source file, then fix the bug so the test passes. Do not modify the test file.
successCriteria: The test in src/user.test.ts passes. The fix must be in src/user.ts — adding a null/undefined guard to greetUser so calling it with a user missing a name does not throw. The test file itself is not modified.
